title: Wire (Pass-Through)
prompt: Create a module with one input and one output that behaves like a wire.

title: Constant Outputs
prompt: Drive output zero to constant 0 and output one to constant 1.
expected_output: zero=0 and one=1 at all times.

title: NOT Gate
2:1 Mux
prompt: Build a 2:1 multiplexer selecting a or b based on sel.
expected_output: y = a when sel=0 else b.

title: 4-bit AND
Half Adder
prompt: Create a half adder producing sum and carry.

title: Full Adder
prompt: Create a full adder with carry-in.

title: 4-bit Ripple Adder
prompt: Add two 4-bit numbers with carry out.

title: D Flip-Flop With Async Reset
prompt: Positive-edge DFF with active-low async reset.
expected_output: q<=0 on reset else q<=d at posedge clk.

title: Mod-10 Counter
prompt: Design a synchronous decade counter (0-9) with sync reset.

title: 4-to-1 Mux (Vectorized)
prompt: Select one of four 8-bit inputs using a 2-bit select.

title: Sequence Detector 1011 (Overlapping)
prompt: Detect the overlapping pattern 1011 on serial input using a Moore FSM.
constraints: Assert detected for one cycle when pattern completes.
expected_output: detected pulses when 1011 seen, overlap allowed.

title: Parameterized Barrel Shifter
prompt: Implement a combinational left rotate by a variable amount for WIDTH-bit data.
constraints: Rotate (not shift); WIDTH is a power of two.
expected_output: out = data rotated left by amt.

title: Synchronous FIFO Pointer Logic
prompt: Implement full/empty generation for a synchronous FIFO of DEPTH using read/write pointers with an extra wrap bit.
constraints: DEPTH is a power of two.
expected_output: full and empty flags computed correctly.
